inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Input Data
inputs.description: Main content passed to the model as the user message.

inputs.name: model
inputs.label: Model
inputs.description: Overrides the configured model at runtime.

inputs.name: system_prompt
inputs.label: System Prompt
inputs.description: Overrides the configured system prompt at runtime.

inputs.name: prompt_prefix
inputs.label: Prefix
inputs.description: Text prepended to the input before sending to the model.

inputs.name: prompt_suffix
inputs.label: Suffix
inputs.description: Text appended to the input before sending to the model.

inputs.name: temperature
inputs.label: Temperature
inputs.description: Overrides the configured temperature (creativity) at runtime.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error message if the AI call failed.

properties.label: Prompt Suffix
